articles.title: Relief Society Exhibit of Handwork Amy W. Evans
articles.author: Amy W. Evans
articles.notes: The article is not present in any of the four provided PDF page images (pages 382-385). The images show poems 'My Wealth' by H.H. Ramsay and 'Spring' by M.C. Stephens, followed by 'The Importance of Standardization in County Welfare Work' by Joseph A. Geddes. The missing article should appear on page 393 according to the table of contents, but these images only cover pages 382-385.
